zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破延续
zh.content:
AVAX/USD当前维持窄幅震荡，价格运行于9.46附近，日内涨幅有限，但整体重心略有抬升。现价站稳20日均线9.30上方，说明短线买盘仍具一定支撑，多头情绪暂未明显转弱。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持正值，表明市场仍存在温和上行动能，短周期趋势偏多。不过RSI数据暂缺，意味着超买超卖状态难以确认，因此行情更可能维持震荡推进，而非快速单边拉升。

关键位置方面，9.42附近形成首个短线支撑，若失守可能回测9.30均线区域；上方9.48至9.50构成即时阻力，一旦有效突破，后续有望测试9.70附近压力区，多空或在该位置展开争夺。

交易策略上，短线投资者可关注9.42上方的低吸机会，并结合成交量确认突破有效性。若价格无法突破9.50且动能减弱，应警惕冲高回落风险，建议严格设置止损并控制仓位。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is showing a cautiously constructive short-term structure, with AVAX/USD trading at 9.4629 and holding near the upper end of the daily range between 9.4172 and 9.4839. The modest 24-hour gain of 0.33% suggests buying pressure remains present, although momentum is not yet aggressive. Price action above the 20-day simple moving average at 9.30364 indicates a mild bullish bias, with traders defending recent gains rather than accelerating into a breakout phase.

The positioning above the SMA(20) is technically encouraging because it reflects improving short-term sentiment and signals that buyers currently retain control of the immediate trend. MACD stands at 0.0513, remaining in positive territory and implying upward momentum is still active. However, the absence of a signal line and RSI(14) limits confirmation strength. Without RSI, it is difficult to judge whether the market is approaching overbought conditions or still has room to extend higher.

Support and resistance levels are becoming increasingly important as AVAX trades near local highs. Immediate support appears around 9.42, aligning closely with the session low and acting as the first defensive area for buyers. A deeper support zone can be observed near the SMA(20) around 9.30, where trend-following demand may emerge. Resistance is forming near 9.48 to 9.50, and a decisive move above that band could open the path toward stronger upside continuation.

Trading approaches should remain balanced rather than overly directional. Momentum-oriented participants may look for confirmation through a sustained break above 9.50 accompanied by stronger volume before considering long exposure. More conservative traders could monitor pullbacks toward 9.42–9.30 for potential entry opportunities while maintaining disciplined risk controls. Failure to hold above these supports may weaken the current bullish tone and shift sentiment toward short-term consolidation or renewed downside pressure.
